title: Football Emoji Copy & Paste ⚽🏈
meta_description: Copy and paste football emojis — soccer ⚽, American football 🏈, rugby 🏉, trophies 🏆, and match emojis. Click any emoji to copy it instantly.
hero_tagline: Soccer, American football, and rugby emojis in one place — plus trophies, cards, and fan emojis. Click any emoji to copy it.
intro: “Football” means soccer ⚽ in most of the world and gridiron 🏈 in the US, so this page covers both. Below you will find the soccer ball and equipment, the American football and rugby balls, and the trophies, cards, and celebration emojis that show up in every matchday post. Click any emoji to copy it and paste it into a bio, caption, or chat.
